steps: Place the ground seeds into a mixing bowl
Add ¼ teaspoon of garam masala
Add ½ teaspoon of black pepper
Add ¼ teaspoon of citric acid
Mix evenly to get the chaat masala
Chop up a watermelon into chunks
Sprinkle the chaat masala over the watermelon
Sprinkle fresh chopped mint leaves. Enjoy!
recipes.name: Watermelon Chaat

steps: Place minced chicken into a bowl
Add 2 1/2 TBSP of ginger garlic paste
Add 2 TBSP of whole spices powder
Heat up frying pan on medium flame
Place slice of tomato on one side
recipes.name: Chicken Chapli Kabab

steps: Place the ground seeds into a mixing bowl
Add ¼ teaspoon of garam masala
Add ½ teaspoon of black pepper
Add ¼ teaspoon of citric acid
Mix evenly to get the chaat masala
Chop up a watermelon into chunks
Sprinkle the chaat masala over the watermelon
Sprinkle fresh chopped mint leaves. Enjoy!
recipes.name: Watermelon Chaat

steps: Add ¼ cup of oil to pan
Add 1 tomato chopped and mix well
Add ¼ TSP of Cumin Powder
Add 2 TBSP of Ginger Garlic Paste
Place lid on pan and cook on medium heat for 15 minutes
Ready to serve. Enjoy with naan, roti, or rice!
recipes.name: Bhindi Masala - Okra with Spices

steps: Heat 3 tsp vegetable oil in a large skillet
Add a little bit of water
Add salt and pepper to taste
Add a pinch of cumin seeds
Add a pinch of fennel seeds
Layer rice with cashew nuts and meatballs
Cook on low heat for 20 minutes or until fully cooked Enjoy!
recipes.name: Turkey Meatball Biryani

steps: Fry for 3-4 minutes on medium flame
Add a pinch of Swad salt
Cover with lid and cook for 5 minutes
Turn off the heat and let it cool down
Blend well and don't add water
Add 1 tsp Swad red chilli powder
Add blended paste back into pot
Cook for 3 minutes on medium flame
Cook for 2 minutes and stir well
Add yogurt and whisk it well
Cover with lid and cook for 3 minutes on medium heat
recipes.name: Mattar Paneer

steps: Soak chole for 8 to 9 hours OR Pop a can of chickpeas (don't forget to rinse & clean)
Cook for 1 to 1.5 hours until tendered
Save the water for later use
Heat up a pan on medium flame
Add 12 to 15 pieces of whole black pepper
Add 4 to 6 pieces (1 inch) of cinnamon sticks
Roast spices from 1 to 2 minutes for the flavors to pop
Blend all spices to fine powder
Heat up a pot on medium flame
Add 2.5 TSP of ginger & garlic paste
Add 5 TBSP of red chili powder
Cover with lid and let it cook for 5 minutes on medium flame
recipes.name: Pindi Chole

productofthemonth.description: Cinnamon Sticks are so versatile and can be used in all types of dishes; savory, sweet and even in drinks. Cinnamon sticks can be used to flavor your oil or add a toasty taste to a comforting drink.

steps: Soak chole for 8 to 9 hours OR Pop a can of chickpeas (don't forget to rinse & clean)
Cook for 1 to 1.5 hours until tendered
Save the water for later use
Heat up a pan on medium flame
Add 12 to 15 pieces of whole black pepper
Add 4 to 6 pieces (1 inch) of cinnamon sticks

Blend all spices to fine powder
Heat up a pot on medium flame

Add 5 TBSP of red chili powder
Cover with lid and let it cook for 5 minutes on medium flame

Cover with lid and let it cook for about 30-40 mins on medium flames

recipes.name: Mattar Paneer

steps: Hint** Use our tandoori masala to save time!
Use a blender. Add 1 tablespoon of chili powder
Add ½ tablespoon of garam masala
Add ½ tablespoon of turmeric powder
Add ⅓ cup of low-fat yogurt
Add the juice of ½ of a lemon
Make 2-3 incisions in each of your chicken drumsticks
Mix your masala from the blender with the chicken in a large bowl
Spray Pam Olive Oil evenly on a grill surface set to 350 degrees fahrenheit
Add the marinated chicken to the grill
Ready to serve after 30 minutes of grill time
recipes.name: Tandoori Chicken

steps: Soak chole for 8 to 9 hours OR Pop a can of chickpeas (don't forget to rinse & clean)
Cook for 1 to 1.5 hours until tendered
Save the water for later use
Heat up a pan on medium flame
Add 12 to 15 pieces of whole black pepper
Add 4 to 6 pieces (1 inch) of cinnamon sticks
Roast spices from 1 to 2 minutes for the flavors to pop
Blend all spices to fine powder
Heat up a pot on medium flame
Add 2.5 TSP of ginger & garlic paste
Add 5 TBSP of red chili powder
Cover with lid and let it cook for 5 minutes on medium flame
recipes.name: Pindi Chole

steps: Soak masoor & moong daal for 1 hour - 125 G each
Add 3 TBSP oil on medium flame
Add 1 1/2 medium onions and stir on medium flame until it turns golden brown
Cover with lid for 40 minutes or till tendered
Add 3 TBSP oil on medium flame in frying pan
recipes.name: Mixed Daal

steps: Add 2 TBSP oil on medium flame
Blend it into thick paste (Leave it on side for now)
7 Add 2 TBSP oil on medium flame
Add 3 TBSP of Ginger garlic paste
Add 1 ½ TSP of turmeric powder
Cover with lid and let it cook for about 30-40 mins on medium flames

productofthemonth.description: Mint is one of the most refreshing herbs and is used in a variety of dishes across the globe. Mint chutney adds a wonderful kick to your savory Swad dishes! Check out our recipes and see how you can pair our mint chutney for a delicious treat.

steps: Heat up the pan on high flame
Stir well to prevent bottom from scorching
Turn off the heat once mixture turns into paste
Add 1/2 glass of milk and mix well
Add 1 1/2 cup of cooking oil into pan
Let it heat on medium flame
Squeeze to take out excess water
recipes.name: Dhai Baray - Yogurt with Spice

steps: Add 1/3 cup of reduce fat yogurt
Add 1 TBSP of ginger & garlic (homemade paste)

recipes.name: Tandoori Chicken

steps: Add 3 TBSP oil on medium flame
Add the chicken on the pan
Remove once the chicken is properly cooked
In the same pan place chopped onions 2 (Big PCS)
Stir the onions for a few minutes
Add chopped tomatoes in the pan 3(Big PCS)
Add 15-20 pieces of cashews in the pan
Add 1 cup of water in the pan
Add ½ TBSP of garam masala
Pour it back into the pot
Add fried chicken in the pot

Add 3 TBSP oil on medium flame in frying pan
recipes.name: Mixed Daal

steps: Add 3 tablespoons of oil to a pan
Add ¼ teaspoon of red chilli
Blanch spinach in a pot for 1 minute
Place blanched spinach in ice water
Blend on low until evenly blended
Add the spinach to the pan
Fry paneer in a separate pan
Add the fried paneer to the spinach
recipes.name: Palak Paneer

steps: Boil for 15 mins or until the carrots are tendered
Add 4 TBSP of oil on to the pan
Stir fry green onion for 5 mins
Mix and mash carrots with green onion
Add 2 TBSP of vegetable curry masala
Garnish with Kasoori Methi and Yogurt
recipes.name: Gajar Ki Saabzi - Cooked Carrots

productofthemonth.description: Garam Masala is a blend of several fragrant spices and its versatility allows you to create many recipes with it! Check out the recipe section for dishes that use garam masala powder!

steps: Add 2 cups of Swad sharbati gold atta
Add water as you mix the atta
Knead and beat the dough until it becomes smooth
Place the ball on the board
Use rolling pin to roll out ball into round
Cook for 1 minute and turn it over
Remove the tava and cook the roti on direct stove
Cook on stove for quick 10-15 seconds and flip
Roti is now ready to serve. Enjoy!

steps: Heat 3 tsp vegetable oil in a large skillet
Add a little bit of water
Add salt and pepper to taste
Add a pinch of cumin seeds
Add a pinch of fennel seeds
Layer rice with cashew nuts and meatballs
Cook on low heat for 20 minutes or until fully cooked Enjoy!
recipes.name: Turkey Meatball Biryani

steps: Add 3 TBSP oil on medium flame
Add the chicken on the pan
Remove once the chicken is properly cooked
In the same pan place chopped onions 2 (Big PCS)
Stir the onions for a few minutes
Add chopped tomatoes in the pan 3(Big PCS)
Add 15-20 pieces of cashews in the pan
Add 1 cup of water in the pan
Add ½ TBSP of garam masala
Pour it back into the pot
Add fried chicken in the pot
recipes.name: Butter Chicken

steps: Place minced chicken into a bowl
Add 2 1/2 TBSP of ginger garlic paste
Add 2 TBSP of whole spices powder
Heat up frying pan on medium flame
Place slice of tomato on one side
recipes.name: Chicken Chapli Kabab

steps: Soak chole for 8 to 9 hours OR Pop a can of chickpeas (don't forget to rinse & clean)
Cook for 1 to 1.5 hours until tendered
Save the water for later use
Heat up a pan on medium flame
Add 12 to 15 pieces of whole black pepper
Add 4 to 6 pieces (1 inch) of cinnamon sticks
Roast spices from 1 to 2 minutes for the flavors to pop
Blend all spices to fine powder
Heat up a pot on medium flame
Add 2.5 TSP of ginger & garlic paste
Add 5 TBSP of red chili powder
Cover with lid and let it cook for 5 minutes on medium flame
recipes.name: Pindi Chole

steps: Soak masoor & moong daal for 1 hour - 125 G each
Add 3 TBSP oil on medium flame
Add 1 1/2 medium onions and stir on medium flame until it turns golden brown
Cover with lid for 40 minutes or till tendered
Add 3 TBSP oil on medium flame in frying pan

Add ¼ teaspoon of red chilli

recipes.name: Palak Paneer

steps: Fry for 3-4 minutes on medium flame
Add a pinch of Swad salt
Cover with lid and cook for 5 minutes
Turn off the heat and let it cool down
Blend well and don't add water
Add 1 tsp Swad red chilli powder
Add blended paste back into pot
Cook for 3 minutes on medium flame
Cook for 2 minutes and stir well
Add yogurt and whisk it well
Cover with lid and cook for 3 minutes on medium heat

Stir well to prevent bottom from scorching
Turn off the heat once mixture turns into paste
Add 1/2 glass of milk and mix well

recipes.name: Dhai Baray - Yogurt with Spice

steps: Add 1/3 cup of reduce fat yogurt
Add 1 TBSP of ginger & garlic (homemade paste)
Add vegetables & fruits, Green bell pepper (1 Med), Red bell pepper (1 Med), Eggplant 2 small , Onion 1 small, Pineapple 12 cubes, Mushroom 6 pcs (Sliced in half), Zucchini 2 PCS (sliced)
Thread in a pattern you like
Heat gas grill to 350 degrees and spray olive oil evenly on the grill surface
After 15 minutes should be ready to eat!

Add 1 tomato chopped and mix well

steps: Boil for 15 mins or until the carrots are tendered
Add 4 TBSP of oil on to the pan
Stir fry green onion for 5 mins
Mix and mash carrots with green onion
Add 2 TBSP of vegetable curry masala
Garnish with Kasoori Methi and Yogurt
recipes.name: Gajar Ki Saabzi - Cooked Carrots

steps: Fry for 3-4 minutes on medium flame
Add a pinch of Swad salt
Cover with lid and cook for 5 minutes
Turn off the heat and let it cool down

recipes.name: Mattar Paneer

steps: Hint** Use our tandoori masala to save time!
Use a blender. Add 1 tablespoon of chili powder
Add ½ tablespoon of garam masala
Add ½ tablespoon of turmeric powder
Add ⅓ cup of low-fat yogurt
Add the juice of ½ of a lemon
Make 2-3 incisions in each of your chicken drumsticks
Mix your masala from the blender with the chicken in a large bowl
Spray Pam Olive Oil evenly on a grill surface set to 350 degrees fahrenheit
Add the marinated chicken to the grill
Ready to serve after 30 minutes of grill time

steps: Add 2 cups of Swad sharbati gold atta
Add water as you mix the atta
Knead and beat the dough until it becomes smooth
Place the ball on the board
Use rolling pin to roll out ball into round
Cook for 1 minute and turn it over
Remove the tava and cook the roti on direct stove
Cook on stove for quick 10-15 seconds and flip
Roti is now ready to serve. Enjoy!
recipes.name: Roti

steps: Heat a medium size pot on medium flame
Let milk heat to a slow simmer
Add 2 packets of Rabri Mix and stir well
Once the mixture gets thicker take off heat and strain into a bowl
Add ⅔ cup of Swad Mango Pulp and mix well
Pour mixture into freezing containers of your choice

Add 2 cups of yogurt to a blender
Add the sliced mangoes to the blender
Blend on low until even. Enjoy!
